quality.bugNote: 6 logic bugs that persisted past initial TDD cycles — discovered through later integration testing or manual play testing, not caught by the developer's own unit tests

notes: Human developer following TDD patterns. The 25 compile/run errors represent the normal iterative cycle of write-compile-fix during development. The 6 bugs represent logic defects that made it through despite test coverage — these required additional debugging cycles to identify and resolve. The developer is the primary author of the entire codebase and has deep domain knowledge of both D&D 5e rules and the system architecture.
